info.title: Identity Exposure
info.description: API to interact with Identity Exposure.

tags.name: AD object
tags.description: Representation of an Active Directory Object

tags.name: Attack type configuration
tags.description: The attack type per directory configuration

tags.name: Attack type option
tags.description: Security profile options relative to attack types (Indicator of Attacks)

tags.name: Checker
tags.description: Checkers are the implementations of the state of the art of AD security

tags.name: Checker option
tags.description: Security profile options relative to checkers (Indicator of Exposure)

tags.name: Cloud statistics
tags.description: Attributes sent to tenable cloud statistics

tags.name: Email notifier
tags.description: An email notification about new deviances

tags.name: Event
tags.description: A change in the Active Directory

tags.name: LDAP configuration
tags.description: Configuration of LDAP for authentication purposes.

tags.name: Lockout policy
tags.description: Configuration of the mechanism that locks out user accounts after multiple failed login attempts.

tags.name: Profile
tags.description: A set of Checker option value

tags.name: Reason
tags.description: The reason why a AD object is marked as deviant

tags.name: Relay
tags.description: Configure relays that make AD queries for Ceti

tags.name: Report access token
tags.description: Token to access the reports download

tags.name: Role
tags.description: Groupment of permissions that may be assigned to several users

tags.name: Topology
tags.description: A graph to represent the trust relationships between different Active Directories

id.description: Unique numeric identifier of the attack

directoryId.description: Identifier of the directory the attacked Domain Controller belongs to

attackTypeId.description: Identifier of the attack-type that has identified the attack

dc.description: Fully qualified domain name of the attacked Domain Controller

date.description: Date on which the attack has been identified

template.description: Localized description template for the attack vector

name.description: Name of the attack vector attribute

value.description: JSON-stringified value of the attack vector attribute

valueType.description: Type of the attack vector attribute

source.description: Information on the source of the attack

destination.description: Information on the destination of the attack

isClosed.description: Whether the customer has closed the attack

codeName.description: Functional key of the attack type

yaraRules.description: YARA rules that describe the attacks identified by the attack-type

mitreAttackDescription.description: Description of the attack-type according to the "MITRE ATT&CK" framework

get.description: Required license type: ioa, ioaPreview, ioe

id.description: Unique numeric identifier of the directory

name.description: User-defined name of the directory

ip.description: IP address or hostname of the Primary Domain Controller

type.x-$comment: Always "ADDS" for directories created via the web UI

ldapPort.description: LDAP port of the Primary Domain Controller

globalCatalogPort.description: Global Catalog port of the Primary Domain Controller

smbPort.description: SMB port of the Primary Domain Controller

dns.description: Fully qualified domain name of the domain

infrastructureId.description: Identifier of the infrastructure to which the directory belongs

infrastructureName.description: Name of the infrastructure to which the directory belongs

ldapInitialized.description: Identifier of the event at which the last LDAP crawling ended

sysvolInitialized.description: Identifier of the event at which the last SYSVOL crawling ended

honeyAccountAdObjectId.description: Identifier of the AD object configured to be the directory's Honey Account

honeyAccountDistinguishedName.description: Distinguished name of the AD object configured to be the directory's Honey Account

honeyAccountConfigurationStatus.description: Configuration status of the directory's Honey Account

sensitiveDataCollectionStatus.description: Connectivity status of the sensitive data collection
